summary_en: Seibu Real Estate completed a tender offer for e'grand, acquiring 5,610,751 shares and warrants, exceeding the minimum threshold and triggering a parent company change effective May 25, 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Completion of Tender Offer for e'grand Co., Ltd. Securities and Changes in Parent Company and Principal Shareholders
translation_en_brief: On May 19, 2026, e'grand Co., Ltd. announced completion of a tender offer by Seibu Real Estate Co., Ltd. (the offeror), which ended on May 18, 2026. The offeror acquired 5,610,751 shares and warrants (measured as underlying shares) out of a total tendered, exceeding the minimum threshold of 4,105,200 shares, making the tender offer effective. Following settlement commencement on May 25, 2026, Seibu Real Estate will become e'grand's new parent company and principal shareholder, with voting rights exceeding 50% of total shareholder voting rights. Seibu Real Estate's parent company, Seibu Holdings Co., Ltd., will also indirectly own e'grand shares and become a parent company. The previous principal shareholder, Hisao Eguchi (who had tendered all his shares except restricted shares held as a director, totaling 1,478,800 shares), will no longer be classified as a principal shareholder post-settlement.
